categories.name: System
categories.description: Display, sound, notifications, power, and storage for your device.
categories.card_text: Brightness 76%, speakers active, energy saver ready.

categories.name: Bluetooth & devices
categories.description: Manage connected devices such as Bluetooth accessories, printers, and input hardware.
categories.card_text: Bluetooth ready, mouse and keyboard connected.

categories.name: Network & internet
categories.description: Connect to Wi-Fi, review usage, and control network behavior.
categories.card_text: Home Wi-Fi 6 is connected and secure.

categories.name: Personalization
categories.description: Adjust wallpaper, theme surfaces, and lock screen visuals.
categories.card_text: Aurora wallpaper is active. You can switch wallpapers below.

categories.name: Apps
categories.description: Manage installed apps, defaults, and optional features.
categories.card_text: This preview build keeps the app surface minimal.

categories.name: Accounts
categories.description: Sign-in, sync state, and account preferences for the current user.
categories.card_text: Signed in as Brittany with a local preview profile.

categories.name: Time & language
categories.description: Review time, regional format, input methods, and language preferences.
categories.card_text: Clock, date, and shell calendar are active.

categories.name: Accessibility
categories.description: Visibility, narration, and input assistance settings.
categories.card_text: High contrast and narration controls can be added next.

categories.name: Privacy & security
categories.description: Device permissions, sign-in protection, and security settings.
categories.card_text: Use Settings to expand privacy controls in the next build.

categories.name: Gaming
categories.description: Game mode, captures, and Xbox-related preferences.
categories.card_text: Game mode is concept-ready but not yet expanded in this shell.

categories.name: Windows Update
categories.description: Preview update state, update label, and future delivery controls.
categories.card_text: Update label 1U00 is active in this preview concept.

home_cards.title: System
home_cards.text: Top cards echo the modern Windows Settings homepage style.

home_cards.title: Mobile devices
home_cards.text: Inspired by recent Windows support pages adding mobile device controls in Settings.

home_cards.title: Windows Update
